Wednesday · May 6th

"On Wednesdays,
we wear pink."

Inspired by Mean Girls, on Wednesday May 6th the whole team is wearing pink — and we're spotlighting our pink clips that day.

Stay tuned on our Instagram for details and Wednesday-only surprises.

Who we are

Made for the girl who notices everything.

Lalah Clips started with a simple frustration — claw clips that either look amazing but fall apart, or hold well but feel boring. We wanted both.

Our collection gives you strong hold, beautiful embellishments, and a price that makes sense for students. Every clip is selected because we'd wear it ourselves.

Find us at TanenbaumCHAT during Venture Week, May 4–8. Stock is limited — when they're gone, they're gone.

L

Leia

Brand Strategist

Leads the brand vision — from clip curation to booth design. Makes sure Lalah Clips looks and feels premium at every touchpoint.

H

Hannah

Operations Manager

Manages inventory, money handling, and booth logistics so the team can focus on selling.

A

Alma

Marketing Manager

Runs the Instagram, designs posters, and builds hype. Behind every post and "where did you get that?" moment.

L

Lia

Strategic Assessment

Tracks the budget, builds the contingency plan, and runs the SWOT. Makes sure the business is ready for anything.
